case_title: RIVERA, IRENE M. VS RODRIGUEZ, JOSE A. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, IRENE M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOSE A. REV. MSGR. SAINT CHARLES CHURCH MARANTHA TOURS INC. IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
